heading: Civil liability for false or fraudulent registration
label: 1120 Civil liability for false or fraudulent registration
text: Any person who shall procure registration in the Patent and Trademark Office of a mark by a false or fraudulent declaration or representation, oral or in writing, or by any false means, shall be liable in a civil action by any person injured thereby for any damages sustained in consequence thereof.
notes: Amendments1975— substituted “Patent and Trademark Office” for “Patent Office”.Pub. L. 93–596
Effective Date of 1975 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 93–596section 4 of Pub. L. 93–596section 1111 of this titleJan. 2, 1975

Repeal and Effect on Existing RightsRepeal of inconsistent provisions, effect of this chapter on pending proceedings and existing registrations and rights under prior acts, see notes set out under .section 1051 of this title
